assessment.note: He names a specific approval-path gap before shipping, which is a strong clarity problem in current workflow expectations.

new_queue.label: Approval path
new_queue.name: Who feels ambiguous in that approval path right now?
new_queue.description: Pins down the specific handoff or owner that is unclear before he pushes code.

new_queue.label: Shipping hesitation
new_queue.name: What usually makes you pause before shipping?
new_queue.description: Distinguishes confidence, tooling, and process reasons behind late reassurance-seeking.

new_queue.label: Tool friction
new_queue.name: Which part of the toolchain slows you down most right now?
new_queue.description: Identifies practical friction that may be creating avoidable hesitation or rework.

new_queue.label: Independence support
new_queue.name: What support from me would help you ship with less second-guessing?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the manager touchpoint that would reduce reassurance dependence over the next two weeks.

new_queue.label: Next focus
new_queue.name: Given what we covered, where do you want to focus first?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete next step and lets Sam choose the most useful immediate priority.
